name: Holiday Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy, medium-sized pan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips with the sweetened condensed milk.
2. Remove from heat and divide the mixture into two bowls.
3. To one bowl, add almond liqueur and almond extract.
4. To the other bowl, add orange-flavored liqueur.
5. Chill for 1 hour.
6. Shape into one-inch balls.
7. Roll in coating.
8. Chill until firm (1 hour).
9. Store covered at room temperature.
